name: Meridith Hammer
bio: Meridith Hammer received negative ratings from nearly every bar association in the Alliance — 10 out of the Alliance bar associations rated her Not Recommended or Not Qualified. The CBA also rated her Not Recommended. In a race where both candidates received universally or near-universally negative bar ratings, voters face an unusually difficult choice.
background: Attorney with civil and family law background.

bar_ratings.alliance_detail: 10 NR/NQ ratings from Alliance bar associations. Near-universal rejection.

red_flags.label: Near-universal Not Recommended from bar associations
red_flags.detail: 10 Alliance bar associations rated Meridith Hammer as Not Recommended or Not Qualified. The Chicago Bar Association also rated her Not Recommended. This is a near-consensus negative assessment from the legal community across all evaluating organizations.
